name: dsa
description: > A complete, no-hand-waving, no-placeholders, real-world-first guide to **Data Structures** and **Algorithms**.   > Written for the person who says: "I know the words, but I have zero clue how these actually live in the software I use every day."

scripts.verify: npm run verify:coverage:write && npm run verify:coverage && npm run verify:examples && npm run docs:build
